'''''White Wolf Inphobia'' 53''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1995]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Wanted by Cracken..Update]]" and was written by [[Timothy D. Jacques]].
